hidden xbrl metadata should vanish

Item 1. Business

Acme Corporation designs and sells widgets worldwide. Revenue comes from three segments.

The company operates in 12 countries.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Demand for widgets may decline due to competition.

Supply chain concentration in a single region poses risks.

Item 7. Management’s Discussion and Analysis

Revenue increased 12% year over year driven by widget pro sales.
